name: ajudd-claude-plugins
description: Personal Claude Code plugins for Aaron Judd

plugins.name: project
plugins.description: Deep-discover a codebase and generate/maintain a full set of Confluence documentation pages (Project Overview, Architecture, Runbook, API Reference, Known Issues, Test Coverage)

plugins.name: cab
plugins.description: Create and manage CAB (Change Advisory Board) cards in Jira for Young Living production deployments. Handles all required fields, ADF formatting, submission, assignee update, and full deploy execution.

plugins.name: jira
plugins.description: Create and manage Jira stories in BPT2. Handles required fields, markdown-to-ADF quirks, assignment, and status transitions.

plugins.name: office
plugins.description: Microsoft 365 commands — Teams messaging, email triage, email send, and meeting invites via the yl-msoffice MCP.

plugins.name: daily-prep
plugins.description: Morning setup routine — Jira briefing, Confluence updates, git repo scan, AWS SSO + CodeArtifact login.

plugins.name: chrome
plugins.description: Launch and manage the persistent Playwright test browser for VO E2E tasks. Handles SSO auth, session startup, and CDP connection.

plugins.name: session
plugins.description: Session lifecycle commands — start a session with intent, checkpoint to save work state and leave nothing behind.
